# Pipesim

**Summary**: A multiphase steady-state flow simulator used for gas and oil system design.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-moh-ali|Moh-Ali, 2024]] used pipesim to model and analyze the removal of liquid loading on a well scale.

## Key Results and Findings

- PIPESIM was used to simulate multiphase flow from the reservoir to the wellhead, helping to optimize injection and production processes. ([[2024-moh-ali|Moh-Ali, 2024, p. 47]])
